title: Healthy snacking surges – Conagra and Mondelēz taking notice
snippet: Healthy snacking continues to gain popularity in the US, with an 18.4% year-over-year sales increase forecasted into 2026, a sign that the trend is more than just a passing fad, according to data analytics firm Spate.
reason: The title mentions 'healthy snacking' and forecasts a sales increase for potato chips/crisps, indicating it's relevant to the potato chip industry.
